options.name: --connection-string
options.description:
The connection string to the target database
engine. Must have the necessary privileges to
execute ddl.

options.name: --location
options.description:
Paths to scan recursively for migration
scripts. Default: Sql_Scripts

options.name: --schema
options.description:
A list of schemas managed by Evolve. If
empty, the default schema for the datasource
connection is used.

options.name: --metadata-table-schema
options.description:
The schema in which the metadata table
is/should be. If empty, it is the first
schema defined or the one of the datasource
connection.

options.name: --metadata-table
options.description:
The name of the metadata table. Default:
changelog

options.name: --placeholder
options.description:
Placeholders are strings to replace in
migration scripts. Format for commandline is
"key:value".

options.name: --placeholder-prefix
options.description: The prefix of the placeholders. Default: ${

options.name: --placeholder-suffix
options.description: The suffix of the placeholders. Default: }

options.name: --target-version
options.description:
Target version to reach. If empty it evolves
all the way up.

options.name: --start-version
options.description:
Version used as starting point for already
existing databases. Default: 0

options.name: --scripts-prefix
options.description:
Migration scripts file names prefix. Default:
V

options.name: --repeatable-scripts-prefix
options.description:
Repeatable migration scripts file names
prefix. Default: R

options.name: --scripts-suffix
options.description:
Migration scripts files extension. Default:
.sql

options.name: --scripts-separator
options.description:
Migration scripts file names separator.
Default: __

options.name: --encoding
options.description:
The encoding of migration scripts. Default:
UTF-8

options.name: --command-timeout
options.description:
The wait time in seconds before terminating
the attempt to execute a migration and
generating an error. Default: 30

options.name: --ambient-tx-timeout
options.description:
The wait time in seconds before terminating
the attempt to execute a migration and
generating an error in the ambient
transaction. Default: 60

options.name: --out-of-order
options.description:
Allows migration scripts to be run “out of
order”. Default: false

options.name: --erase-disabled
options.description:
When set, ensures that Evolve will never
erase schemas. Highly recommended in
production. Default: false

options.name: --erase-on-validation-error
options.description:
When set, Evolve will erase the database
schemas and will re-execute migration scripts
from scratch if validation phase fails.
Intended to be used in development only.
Default: fasle

options.name: --enable-cluster-mode
options.description:
By default, Evolve will use a session level
lock to coordinate the migration on multiple
nodes. Default: true

options.name: --embedded-resource-assembly
options.description:
When set, Evolve will scan the given list of
assembly to load embedded migration scripts.

options.name: --embedded-resource-filter
options.description:
When set, exclude embedded migration scripts
that do not start with one of these filters.

options.name: --retry-repeatable
options.description:
When set, execute repeatedly all repeatable
migrations for as long as the number of
errors decreases, so that you can name them
more easily. Default: false

options.name: --transaction-mode
options.description:
Scope of the Evolve transaction. Default:
CommitEach
Allowed values are: CommitEach, CommitAll,
RollbackAll.

options.name: --skip-next-migrations
options.description:
When set, mark all subsequent migrations as
applied. Default: false

options.name: --keyspace
options.description:
A list of keyspaces managed by Evolve
(Cassandra only).

options.name: --metadata-table-keyspace
options.description:
The keyspace in which the metadata table
is/should be (Cassandra only).

options.name: --sql-server-access-token
options.description:
An Azure-issued access token to be used when
connecting to SQL Server.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

arguments.name: COMMAND
arguments.description:
migrate | erase | repair | info | validate
Allowed values are: migrate, erase, repair,
info, validate.

arguments.name: DATABASE
arguments.description:
postgresql | sqlite | sqlserver | mysql |
mariadb | cassandra | cockroachdb
Allowed values are: postgresql, sqlite,
sqlserver, mysql, mariadb, cassandra,
cockroachdb.
